commit_subject: cookies: reject incoming cookies set for TLDs
TLS: switch off SSL session id when client cert is used
cookie: replace use of fgets() with custom version
base64: check for integer overflow on large input
aprintf: detect wrap-around when growing allocation
parsedate: handle cut off numbers better
idn: switch to libidn2 use and IDNA2008 support
schannel: fix wildcard cert name validation on Win CE
imap: if a FETCH response has no size, don't call write callback
TLS: Fix switching off SSL session id when client cert is used
ntlm: avoid integer overflow for malloc size
http2: fix incorrect trailer buffer size
Curl_close: clear data->multi_easy on free to avoid use-after-free
smtp: avoid risk of buffer overflow in strtol
security:read_data fix bad realloc()
Curl_easy: remember last connection by id, not by pointer
ftp: make wc_statemach loop instead of recurse
openssl: associate/detach the transfer from connection
mqtt: clear the leftovers pointer when sending succeeds
ftp,imap,pop3: do not ignore --ssl-reqd
post_per_transfer: remove the updated file name
fopen: add Curl_fopen() for better overwriting of files
x509asn1: remove superfluous free()
content_encoding: drop support for zlib before 1.2.0.4
ws: handle blocked sends better
[4.2.x] Fixed CVE-2024-41989 -- Prevented excessive memory consumption in floatformat.
[4.2.x] Fixed CVE-2024-42005 -- Mitigated QuerySet.values() SQL injection attacks against JSON fields.
fsck: detect submodule urls starting with dash
protect_ntfs: turn on NTFS protection by default
Disallow dubiously-nested submodule git directories
credential: avoid writing values with newlines
upstream: factor SSH_AGENT_CONSTRAIN_EXTENSION parsing into its own
x509: fix double locking problem
clean up merge
Fix for CVE-2014-0185
Fix a crash that could occur if a sub-select that uses both DISTINCT and window functions also used an ORDER BY that is the same as its select list.
Whenever a generated column is used, assume that all columns are used.

When processing constant integer values in ORDER BY clauses of window definitions (see check-in [7e4809eadfe99ebf]) be sure to fully disable the constant value to avoid an invalid pointer dereference if the expression is ever duplicated. This fixes a crash report from Yongheng and Rui.
Set default ReadTimeout value to 60s
zlib 1.3.1
